positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial botanical arrangement featuring bioluminescent flora and nebula dust. The central subject is a majestic, stylized moon surrounded by intertwining cosmic vines and glowing exotic flowers. Use a neo-art deco aesthetic blended with ethereal watercolor techniques. Composition must be centered and circular, creating a strong, scalable silhouette against a deep indigo and velvet black background. Highlight areas with vibrant teal, magenta, and soft gold accents. The style should be optimized for screen printing and textile transfer, ensuring clean lines, crisp edges, and maximum visual impact. Ultra-detailed, volumetric lighting, high contrast, graphic quality, full body print composition.
